query:
SELECT id, documentTitle, documentType, educationLevel, grade, subject, language,
  CASE WHEN extractedContent IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(extractedContent) > 100 THEN 'HAS_CONTENT' ELSE 'NO_CONTENT' END as content_status,
  LENGTH(extractedContent) as content_length
FROM referenceDocuments
ORDER BY educationLevel, grade, subject
LIMIT 50;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user AjDsC9LvEN3h2eS.4d2621146f30 --database 7KYbbDR94nK6ykUvdjLGsp --execute 
SELECT id, documentTitle, documentType, educationLevel, grade, subject, language,
  CASE WHEN extractedContent IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(extractedContent) > 100 THEN 'HAS_CONTENT' ELSE 'NO_CONTENT' END as content_status,
  LENGTH(extractedContent) as content_length
FROM referenceDocuments
ORDER BY educationLevel, grade, subject
LIMIT 50;
